name: Hawaiian Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the lean meat in a small glass bowl and stir to mix well.
2. Place the meat, 3-4 layers deep, in a container and spoon the sauce mixture over each layer.
3. Cover tightly and marinate for 6-12 hours in the refrigerator, stirring occasionally and keeping the mixture covered.
4. Lay out the meat on trays and dehydrate for 24 to 36 hours. In this recipe, pineapple chunks with their juice were used in the marinade and then dehydrated along with the meat.
